name: Apple Cinnamon Coffee Cake
recipeIngredient: 5 to 6 cups sliced apples (Granny Smiths are recommended)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. Grease a 12-cup tube or bundt pan with Pam.
3. Combine cinnamon and sugar in a separate bowl; set aside 1 tablespoon. Toss the prepared apples with the remaining cinnamon-sugar mixture.
4. In another bowl, whisk together the remaining sugar, applesauce, vanilla, orange juice, salt, and eggs.
5. In a separate bowl, combine flour, baking powder, and nutmeg.
6. Fold the dry ingredients into the wet mixture until just combined.
7. Spoon more than one-third of the batter into the prepared pan.
8. Cover with half of the apple mixture.
9. Spoon in the remaining batter and apple slices.
10. Sprinkle the reserved cinnamon-sugar on top lightly.
11. Bake for 1 hour or until done. Loosen sides with a butter knife, then invert the cake onto a plate for serving.
